cards.name: Blue-eyes White Dragon
cards.description: An extremely rare card with unsurpassed attack and defense power.

cards.name: Mystical Elf
cards.description: A delicate elf that lacks in offense but has a terrific defense backed by mystical power.

cards.name: Hitotsu-me Giant
cards.description: A one-eyed behemoth with thick, powerful arms made for delivering punishing blows.

cards.name: Baby Dragon
cards.description: Much more than just a child, this dragon is gifted with untapped power.

cards.name: Ryu-kishin
cards.description: A very elusive creature that looks like a harmless statue until it attacks.

cards.name: Feral Imp
cards.description: A playful little imp that lurks in the dark, waiting to attack an unwary enemy.

cards.name: Winged Dragon #1
cards.description: A dragon commonly found guarding mountain fortresses. Its signature attack is a sweeping dive from out of the blue.

cards.name: Mushroom Man
cards.description: Found in moist areas, this monster launches poison spores against its enemies.

cards.name: Shadow Specter
cards.description: Ghostly beast that appears in the wasteland and is particularly troublesome when faced in large numbers.

cards.name: Blackland Fire Dragon
cards.description: A dragon that dwells in the depths of darkness. Its defensive capability suffers from its poor eyesight.

cards.name: Sword Arm of Dragon
cards.description: With a body covered in sword-like thorns, nothing dares stand in the way of this monster when it charges.

cards.name: Swamp Battleguard
cards.description: This creature is armed with a spiked club that can destroy almost anything in its path. Rumored to have a brother that is just as destructive.

cards.name: Tyhone
cards.description: Capable of firing cannonballs from its mouth for long-range attacks against enemies.

cards.name: Battle Steer
cards.description: A bull monster often found in the woods. Charges enemy monsters with a pair of razor-sharp horns.

cards.name: Flame Swordsman
cards.description: A fighter gifted with the power of fire. Attacks enemies with a sword that launches flames.

cards.name: Time Wizard
cards.description: A sorcerer capable of bending time to his will. Though not powerful at first glance, appearances can be deceiving.

cards.name: Right Leg of the Forbidden One
cards.description: A forbidden limb sealed by magic. Whoever breaks this seal will know infinite power. Only one card of this type may be included in a deck.

cards.name: Left Leg of the Forbidden One
cards.description: A forbidden limb sealed by magic. Whoever breaks this seal will know infinite power. Only one card of this type may be included in a deck.

cards.name: Right Arm of the Forbidden One
cards.description: A forbidden limb sealed by magic. Whoever breaks this seal will know infinite power. Only one card of this type may be included in a deck.

cards.name: Left Arm of the Forbidden One
cards.description: A forbidden limb sealed by magic. Whoever breaks this seal will know infinite power. Only one card of this type may be included in a deck.

cards.name: Exodia the Forbidden
cards.description: Once combined with arms and legs, this monster is freed from its magical chains. Only one card of this type may be included in a deck.

cards.name: Summoned Skull
cards.description: An entity with dark powers for confusing the enemy. Among the FIEND class of monsters, this is a pretty rare card.

cards.name: The Wicked Worm Beast
cards.description: A monster worm created by the powers of darkness. It suddenly appears from under the ground to attack its enemies.

cards.name: Skull Servant
cards.description: A skeletal ghost that isn't strong but can mean trouble in large numbers.

cards.name: Horn Imp
cards.description: A small imp that dwells in the dark. Its single horn makes it a formidable opponent.

cards.name: Battle Ox
cards.description: A monster with tremendous power. Destroys enemies with a swing of its axe.

cards.name: Beaver Warrior
cards.description: What this creature lacks in size, it makes up for in defense when battling in the meadow.

cards.name: Rock Ogre Grotto #1
cards.description: Protected by a solid body of rock, this creature throws a bone-shattering punch.

cards.name: Mountain Warrior
cards.description: A solid warrior that can move swiftly over rough terrain.

cards.name: Zombie Warrior
cards.description: A deceptively fragile-looking skeleton warrior that is known for its swift and precise attacks.

cards.name: Koumori Dragon
cards.description: A vicious, fire-breathing dragon whose wicked flames corrupt the souls of its victims.

cards.name: Two-headed King Rex
cards.description: An unusual and rarely seen two-headed dragon.

cards.name: Judge Man
cards.description: For this club-wielding warrior, there is no other outcome to battle than victory or defeat.

cards.name: Saggi the Dark Clown
cards.description: This clown appears out of nowhere and executes some very strange moves to avoid enemy attacks.

cards.name: Dark Magician
cards.description: The ultimate wizard in terms of attack and defense.

cards.name: The Snake Hair
cards.description: A monster with the head of a poisonus snake. One look will turn an unwary opponent to stone.

cards.name: Gaia the Dragon Champion
cards.description: A warrior's prowess combines with a dragon's speed to create a powerful offensive force.

cards.name: Gaia the Fierce Knight
cards.description: A knight mounted on a horse that travels faster than the wind. His battle charge is a force to be reckoned with.

cards.name: Curse of Dragon
cards.description: A wicked dragon that taps dark forces to execute a powerful attack.

cards.name: Dragon Piper
cards.description: A jar carved with strange patterns. It has a particularly high defense factor.

cards.name: Celtic Guardian
cards.description: An elf, who learned to wield a sword, baffles enemies with lightning-swift attacks.

cards.name: Illusionist Faceless Mage
cards.description: Manipulates enemy attacks with the power of illusion. A very rare card.

cards.name: Karbonala Warrior
cards.description: A very average-looking fighter with an unusually high attack factor.

cards.name: Rogue Doll
cards.description: A unique doll gifted with mystical power. Particularly powerful when attacking against dark forces.

cards.name: Oscillo Hero #2
cards.description: Attacks its enemies with thunder.

cards.name: Griffore
cards.description: This creature's tough hide deflects just about any attack.

cards.name: Torike
cards.description: Not as tough as it looks in terms of defense. This monster's sharp horn gives it an edge when attacking.

cards.name: Sangan
cards.description: A compact, three-eyed monster that is dangerous when faced in the dark.

cards.name: Big Insect
cards.description: A giant ant that dwells in the jungle. Powerful in terms of both ATK and DEF factors.

cards.name: Basic Insect
cards.description: Usually found travelling in swarms, this creature's ideal environment is the forest.

cards.name: Armored Lizard
cards.description: A lizard with a very tough hide and a very vicious bite.

cards.name: Hercules Beetle
cards.description: A massive beetle with a tough hide and a dangerous horn.

cards.name: Killer Needle
cards.description: A huge bee with exceptional strength. Particularly dangerous when a swarm is encountered.

cards.name: Gokibore
cards.description: A large, spherical roach that attacks its enemies by rolling over them. Its tough defense makes it a formidable foe.

cards.name: Giant Flea
cards.description: A giant blood-sucking flea that's devastating when attacking.

cards.name: Larvae Moth
cards.description: Not much in its larval form, this creature is a force to be reckoned with when it grows to become a colossal moth.

cards.name: Great Moth
cards.description: A powerful creature of the forest, this huge moth attacks its enemies by spreading poison dust with its wings.

cards.name: Kuriboh
cards.description: By itself, this small creature may not seem like much. But in the dark, it attacks in numbers as a formidable force.

cards.name: Mammoth Graveyard
cards.description: A mammoth that protects the gravesite of its pack. It's absolutely merciless when facing graverobbers.

cards.name: Great White
cards.description: A giant white shark with razor-sharp teeth.

cards.name: Wolf
cards.description: A rarely seen wolf with a powerful nose for catching the scent of an enemy.

cards.name: Harpie Lady
cards.description: A human-shaped animal with wings. Beautiful to watch, but lethal when engaged in battle.

cards.name: Harpie Lady Sisters
cards.description: Three fierce sisters who relentlessly attack as a team.

cards.name: Tiger Axe
cards.description: A fast and powerful axe-wielding beast warrior.

cards.name: Silver Fang
cards.description: A snow wolf that's beautiful to the eye but absolutely vicious in battle.

cards.name: Kojikocy
cards.description: A man-hunter with powerful arms that can crush boulders.

cards.name: Perfectly Ultimate Great Moth
cards.description: The final incarnation of the ultimate insect, the Great Moth!

cards.name: Garoozis
cards.description: An axe-swinging beast warrior with the head of a dragon.

cards.name: Thousand Dragon
cards.description: A dragon that has grown and developed over a thousand years.

cards.name: Fiend Kraken
cards.description: A massive squid that suddenly appears from the depths of the sea to attack unwary enemies.

cards.name: Jellyfish
cards.description: An almost invisible, semi-transparent jellyfish that drifts in the sea.

cards.name: Cocoon of Evolution
cards.description: This creature is capable of instantly evolving larvae into adults.

cards.name: Kairyu-shin
cards.description: A sea dragon that's referred to as the "King of the Ocean". It attacks its enemies with huge tidal waves.

cards.name: Giant Soldier of Stone
cards.description: A giant warrior made of stone. A punch from this creature has earth-shaking results.

cards.name: Man-eating Plant
cards.description: A meat-eating plant that is attractive to the eye but dangerous when approached.

cards.name: Krokodilus
cards.description: A vicious crocodile with intelligence. Hard scales form a natural armor for this creature.

cards.name: Grappler
cards.description: A devious snake with a thick body that wraps around an enemy monster and squeezes the life out of it.

cards.name: Axe Raider
cards.description: An axe-wielding monster of tremendous strength and agility.

cards.name: Megazowler
cards.description: Nothing stands in the way of this spike-covered dinosaur.

cards.name: Uraby
cards.description: Fast on its feet, this dinosaur rips enemies to shreds with its sharp claws.

cards.name: Crawling Dragon #2
cards.description: A powerful dragon with teeth that can grind almost anything to dust.

cards.name: Red-eyes B. Dragon
cards.description: A very rare card with a high-level ATK factor.

cards.name: Castle of Dark Illusions
cards.description: A creature that can generate darkness to envelop all that exists around it.

cards.name: Reaper of the Cards
cards.description: This monster boasts a strong defense and a massive scythe that cuts through almost anything.

cards.name: King of Yamimakai
cards.description: Wields the power of darkness to destroy its enemies.

cards.name: Barox
cards.description: This creature flies through the dark, attacking its enemies with its long, hairy arms.

cards.name: Dark Chimera
cards.description: A fire-breathing monster that dwells in the netherworld.

cards.name: Metal Guardian
cards.description: A fiend guarding the treasures of the netherworld. Its defense is particularly high in a dark environment.

cards.name: Catapult Turtle
cards.description: Well-protected by its shell, this monster flings projectiles from its catapult.

cards.name: Gyakutenno Megami
cards.description: Uses her mystical power to protect the weak and provide spiritual support.

cards.name: Mystic Horseman
cards.description: Half man and half horse, this monster is known for its extreme speed.

cards.name: Rabid Horseman
cards.description: A powerful and unstoppable combination of bull and horse.

cards.name: Zanki
cards.description: Prefers to face enemies one-on-one. His swiftly drawn blade delivers a quick and immediate finnish.

cards.name: Crawling Dragon
cards.description: A weakened dragon that can no longer fly, but is still a formidable force to be reckoned with.

cards.name: Crass Clown
cards.description: A performer in the Dark Circus, this clown drains the strength of its enemies with strange dances.

cards.name: Armored Zombie
cards.description: A warrior raised from the beyond. Blindly swings a sharp blade with devastating force.

cards.name: Dragon Zombie
cards.description: A dragon revived by sorcery. Its breath is highly corrosive.

cards.name: Clown Zombie
cards.description: A clown revived by the powers of darkness. Its strange dance has sent many monsters to their ends.

cards.name: Pumpking the King of Ghosts
cards.description: This pumpkin king strikes at its enemies with its long tentacles.

cards.name: Battle Warrior
cards.description: A warrior that fights with his bare hands.

cards.name: Wings of Wicked Flame
cards.description: Soaring over its enemies on wings of crimson fire, this monster attacks by blasting flames from its body.

cards.name: Mask of Darkness
cards.description: A shadow mask created by the hands of a dark mage.

cards.name: Job-change Mirror
cards.description: An indestructible, wicked mirror that blocks enemy attacks.

cards.name: Curtain of the Dark Ones
cards.description: A curtain woven by the hands of a sorcerer. It is said to enhance the power of magic- users.

cards.name: Tomozaurus
cards.description: A deceivingly small creature that is so vicious it attacks both friend and foe without discretion.

cards.name: Spirit of the Winds
cards.description: A spirit of the wind that freely sails the skies. Known to generate storms when it's in a bad mood.

cards.name: Kageningen
cards.description: Uses both its physical and shadow forms to attack, making it a difficult creature to overcome.

cards.name: Graveyard and the Hand of Invitation
cards.description: A final resting place that enhances the power of the doomed and drains that of the living.

cards.name: Goddess with the Third Eye
cards.description: A goddess with an all-seeing eye that reveals all.

cards.name: Hero of the East
cards.description: A samurai from the Far East armed with a razor-sharp sword.

cards.name: Doma The Angel of Silence
cards.description: This angel rules over the doomed and administers it when necessary.

cards.name: That Which Feeds on Life
cards.description: A vile monster that fuels its power by draining the essence of life from its opponents.

cards.name: Dark Gray
cards.description: Entirely gray, this beast has rarely been seen by mortal eyes.

cards.name: White Magical Hat
cards.description: A gentleman thief that eludes the law despite the fact that he sticks out like a sore thumb with his silk hat and white cape.

cards.name: Kamion Wizard
cards.description: A magic-user that controls chaos and wields a mighty sickle.

cards.name: Nightmare Scorpion
cards.description: A very toxic creature that induces nightmares and attacks its victims with four poison- tipped stingers.

cards.name: Spirit of the Books
cards.description: A spirit of the books with infinite knowledge and an endless variety of attack strategies.

cards.name: Supporter in the Shadows
cards.description: A cute elf that assists against enemies while remaining hidden from sight.

cards.name: Trial of Nightmares
cards.description: Passes judgment on enemies that are locked in coffins.

cards.name: Dream Clown
cards.description: The mysterious dance of this creature draws its enemies into eternal slumber.

cards.name: Sleeping Lion
cards.description: Frequently found sleeping, this monster is very dangerous when awakened.

cards.name: Yamatano Dragon Scroll
cards.description: This dragon is conjured from a picture scroll to attack enemies. It has a pretty low defense factor.

cards.name: Dark Plant
cards.description: A vicious flower raised from polluted soil and fertilized by dark forces.

cards.name: Ancient Tool
cards.description: An engine of destruction discovered in the ruins of an ancient civilization.

cards.name: Faith Bird
cards.description: A bird with a very long tail that attacks with a light that emanates from its entire being.

cards.name: Orion the Battle King
cards.description: A mysterious creature known as the king of warriors, but nobody has lived long enough to tell how it earned its reputation.

cards.name: Ansatsu
cards.description: A silent and swift warrior specializing in sneak attack.

cards.name: LaMoon
cards.description: A sorcerer who lives on the moon and attacks opponents with the power of lunar light.

cards.name: Nemuriko
cards.description: A child-like creature that controls a sleep spirit to beckon enemies into eternal slumber.

cards.name: Weather Control
cards.description: This monster is capable of manipulating the weather. This power is the reason behind the changing climate of mountains.

cards.name: Octoberser
cards.description: A strange creature with the head of a fish and the tentacles of an octopus that attacks its enemies with spears.

cards.name: The 13th Grave
cards.description: A zombie that suddenly appeared from plot #13 - supposedly an empty grave.

cards.name: Charubin the Fire Knight
cards.description: A warrior protected by a shell that can even deflect the heat of burning flames.

cards.name: Mystical Capture Chain
cards.description: A mystical chain that is believed capable of binding its enemies and preventing their attacks.

cards.name: Fiend's Hand
cards.description: Long arms reach out from the Swamp of Chaos to drag in enemy creatures.

cards.name: Witty Phantom
cards.description: Dressed in a night-black tuxedo, this creature presides over the doomed.

cards.name: Mystery Hand
cards.description: Twisting the fabric of reality, arms stretch out from another dimension to attack opponents.

cards.name: Dragon Statue
cards.description: A granite warrior with a dragon's soul wields a powerful sword against all enemies.

cards.name: Blue-eyed Silver Zombie
cards.description: A creature rumored to turn enemies into zombies with a strange ray that emanates from its eyes.

cards.name: Toad Master
cards.description: Thousands of years old, this frog wizard attacks enemies with an army of tadpoles.

cards.name: Spiked Snail
cards.description: Evolving from the powers of darkness, this snail has arms and legs that allow swift attacks against its enemies.

cards.name: Flame Manipulator
cards.description: Attacks enemies with fire-related spells, such as the "Sea of Flames" and the "Wall of Fire".

cards.name: Necrolancer the Timelord
cards.description: The first in a line of golems that appears almost anywhere from within a dimensional ring.

cards.name: Djinn the Watcher of the Wind
cards.description: Controls the air currents to create violent winds and tornadoes to blow away its enemies.

cards.name: The Bewitching Phantom Thief
cards.description: A flashy, black-caped thief who wields a magic cane.

cards.name: Temple of Skulls
cards.description: A weird temple of skulls and bones that sucks the living essence of all those who dare approach it.

cards.name: Monster Egg
cards.description: A warrior hidden within an egg that attacks enemies by flinging eggshells.

cards.name: The Shadow Who Controls the Dark
cards.description: A living shadow that dwells in the realm of darkness. It paralyzes its enemies to prevent attacks.

cards.name: Lord of the Lamp
cards.description: A giant that appears from a mystic lamp and follows the orders of the lamp's owner.

cards.name: Akihiron
cards.description: A mysterious creature that dwells below the sea.

cards.name: Rhaimundos of the Red Sword
cards.description: A warrior armed with the Sword of Crimson Flames. Uses fire to bind the movement of its enemies.

cards.name: The Melting Red Shadow
cards.description: A creature that melts into the earth, melds with an opponent's shadow, and attacks from below.

cards.name: Dokuroizo the Grim Reaper
cards.description: A living spirit that preys on the living essence of enemies.

cards.name: Fire Reaper
cards.description: A creature that deals out punishment with its flaming arrows.

cards.name: Larvas
cards.description: A fast-moving, bird-like creature that strangles an opposing monster with its long, thin arms.

cards.name: Hard Armor
cards.description: A living suit of armor that attacks enemies with a bone-jarring tackle.

cards.name: Firegrass
cards.description: A fire-breathing plant found growing near volcanoes.

cards.name: Man Eater
cards.description: Man-eating plant with poison feelers for attacking enemies.

cards.name: Dig Beak
cards.description: Coiling its serpent-like body, this creature spins and attacks with its snapping beak.

cards.name: M-warrior #1
cards.description: Specializing in combination attacks, this warrior uses magnetism to block an enemy's escape.

cards.name: M-warrior #2
cards.description: Specializing in combination attacks, this warrior is equipped with a tough, magnetically coated armor.

cards.name: Tainted Wisdom
cards.description: A parasite brain that preys on the knowledge and intelligence of its opponents.

cards.name: Lisark
cards.description: An unusual creature with sapphire eyes that creates visions to confuse the enemy.

cards.name: Lord of Zemia
cards.description: A vile entity that deceives enemies into walking a path of destruction.

cards.name: The Judgement Hand
cards.description: The hand of final judgment is capable of intense attacks against the enemy.

cards.name: Mysterious Puppeteer
cards.description: A puppet master that manipulates enemies during battle.

cards.name: Ancient Jar
cards.description: A fragile jar from the past containing a mysterious creature.

cards.name: Darkfire Dragon
cards.description: Scorching flames that wipe out enemies in the blink of an eye.

cards.name: Dark King of the Abyss
cards.description: King of the netherworld. It's said that he once had the power to rule over the Dark.

cards.name: Spirit of the Harp
cards.description: A spirit that soothes the soul with the music of its glorious harp.

cards.name: Big Eye
cards.description: This creature is covered with hypnotic eyes for mesmerizing its enemies.

cards.name: Armaill
cards.description: A strange warrior who manipulates three fearsome blades with both hands and its tail.

cards.name: Dark Prisoner
cards.description: This creature manipulates light to eliminate all traces of its appearance.

cards.name: Hurricail
cards.description: A twister that runs rampant in the wastelands, cutting its enemies with blades of wind.

cards.name: Ancient Brain
cards.description: Exiled from reality, this creature is adept at fighting in the dark.

cards.name: Fire Eye
cards.description: A winged eye enveloped in flames that attacks enemies with fire.

cards.name: Monsturtle
cards.description: A vicious turtle with a spiked shell.

cards.name: Claw Reacher
cards.description: Stretching arms and razor-sharp claws make this monster a formidable opponent.

cards.name: Phantom Dewan
cards.description: A wizard that freezes an enemy's movement with a single curse.

cards.name: Arlownay
cards.description: A maiden in the flower blossoms spreads poisonous pollen against opponents.

cards.name: Dark Shade
cards.description: Emits a dazzling light from its crystal to blind its enemies.

cards.name: Masked Clown
cards.description: A dancing warrior that makes mincemeat out of opponents with a sharp scythe.

cards.name: Lucky Trinket
cards.description: A thin and reedy creature protected by sacred power.

cards.name: Genin
cards.description: Uses amazing sleight-of-hand to fool and destroy its enemies.

cards.name: Eyearmor
cards.description: This warrior confuses and destroys enemies by adopting their images.

cards.name: Fiend Refrection #2
cards.description: A bird-beast that summons reinforcements with a hand mirror.

cards.name: Gate Deeg
cards.description: A creature with an abdominal portal used for summoning monsters from the netherworld.

cards.name: Synchar
cards.description: An ugly creature with two heads and a mouth for blasting laser beams.

cards.name: Fusionist
cards.description: A monstrous cat with wings and a long, striking tail.

cards.name: Akakieisu
cards.description: A wizard whose incantations numb the senses of opposing monsters.

cards.name: LaLa Li-oon
cards.description: Protected by thunder, this dangerous cloud attacks its enemies with acid rain.

cards.name: Key Mace
cards.description: A small angel whose cuteness melts the hearts of its enemies.

cards.name: Turtle Tiger
cards.description: A tiger encased in a protective shell that attacks its enemies with its razor-sharp fangs.

cards.name: Terra the Terrible
cards.description: Know as a dweller of the swamps, this creature is a minion of the Dark forces.

cards.name: Doron
cards.description: An unpredictable creature that splits into two and attacks an enemy from opposite directions.

cards.name: Arma Knight
cards.description: An ammonite warrior that has protected the seas from the dawn of time.

cards.name: Mech Mole Zombie
cards.description: A creature of the night that attacks enemies with its rocket-powered arms.

cards.name: Happy Lover
cards.description: A little angel that fires beams of happiness from the heart jewel on its forehead.

cards.name: Penguin Knight
cards.description: A penguin-like creature that slides on its belly to deliver a blow with its outstretched sword.

cards.name: Petit Dragon
cards.description: A very small dragon known for its vicious attacks.

cards.name: Frenzied Panda
cards.description: A savage beast that carries a big bamboo stick for beating down its enemies.

cards.name: Air Marmot of Nefariousness
cards.description: A horned beaver with wings that throws high-velocity acorns from the sky with uncanny accuracy.

cards.name: Phantom Ghost
cards.description: Malicious spirits that walk the world of the living, unable to find their final resting place.

cards.name: Mabarrel
cards.description: A cannon-like monster that rapidly fires eyeballs at the enemy.

cards.name: Dorover
cards.description: An ugly, melting creature that breathes out poison gas.

cards.name: Twin Long Rods #1
cards.description: This creature swings its whip-like arms for mid-range attacks against enemies.

cards.name: Droll Bird
cards.description: With a battle cry that curdles the blood of its opponent, this creature attacks with its massive beak.

cards.name: Petit Angel
cards.description: A quick-moving and tiny angel that's very difficult to hit.

cards.name: Winged Cleaver
cards.description: This creature attacks by swinging around its sickle-like arms.

cards.name: Hinotama Soul
cards.description: An intensely hot flame creature that rams anything that stands in its way.

cards.name: Kaminarikozou
cards.description: This creature stores lightning within its body to deliver electrifying attacks.

cards.name: Meotoko
cards.description: A huge monster with a single eye that fires an intence beam.

cards.name: Aqua Madoor
cards.description: A wizard of the waters that conjures a liquid wall to crush any enemies that oppose him.

cards.name: Kagemusha of the Blue Flame
cards.description: Serves as a double for the ruler of the Blue Flame. A master swordsman that wields a fine blade.

cards.name: Flame Ghost
cards.description: A fiery spirit that burns anything in its path.

cards.name: Dryad
cards.description: A spirit of the forest protected by the surrounding plant life.

cards.name: B. Skull Dragon
cards.description: A very rare creature created from the fusion of an uncommon beast and a vicious dragon.

cards.name: Two-mouth Darkruler
cards.description: A dinosaur with two crushing jaws. Stores electricity in its horn and releases high voltage bolts from the mouth on its back.

cards.name: Solitude
cards.description: A beast-warrior that swings a massive scythe that draws on the spirit of its enemies to deliver devastating blows.

cards.name: Masked Sorcerer
cards.description: A mysterious wizard whose face remains forever hidden behind a strange mask.

cards.name: Kumootoko
cards.description: A massive, intelligent spider that traps its enemies with webbing.

cards.name: Midnight Fiend
cards.description: A winged creature rumored to appear at midnight.

cards.name: Roaring Ocean Snake
cards.description: A massive sea serpent that creates tidal waves to wipe out its enemies.

cards.name: Trap Master
cards.description: A warrior that excels in laying traps such as a bottomless pit, for eternally ensnaring opponents.

cards.name: Fiend Sword
cards.description: Few have escaped the curse of this creature. Those that have done so have gained untold power.

cards.name: Skull Stalker
cards.description: Swift and vicious, this monster grabs its victim with its pincers and attacks the captive with its poison stinger.

cards.name: Hitodenchak
cards.description: A vicious starfish that spits acid to melt away its enemies.

cards.name: Wood Remains
cards.description: A zombie that rose from the remains of the woodland ruler.

cards.name: Hourglass of Life
cards.description: A creature that allows power to be gained at the cost of life.

cards.name: Rare Fish
cards.description: An unusual and ferocious fish with the head of a beast.

cards.name: Wood Clown
cards.description: An unpleasantly smiling creature that wields a scythe to avoid enemy blows.

cards.name: Madjinn Gunn
cards.description: A living weapon that fires projectiles from its mouth.

cards.name: Dark Titan of Terror
cards.description: A spirit said to dwell in the world of dreams. Attacks enemies in their sleep.

cards.name: Beautiful Headhuntress
cards.description: A lovely swordmaster with some very agile moves.

cards.name: Wodan the Resident of the Forest
cards.description: A warrior that has long resided in the forest and enjoys the protection of Mother Nature.

cards.name: Guardian of the Labyrinth
cards.description: A warrior that guards the entrance to the netherworld.

cards.name: Haniwa
cards.description: An earthen doll that protects the treasure in the tombs of ancient kings.

cards.name: Yashinoki
cards.description: A palm tree with a will of its own that attacks enemies by flinging coconuts.

cards.name: Vishwar Randi
cards.description: A woman warrior that serves the forces of darkness.

cards.name: The Drdek
cards.description: An eyeball creature with legs for jumping high and delivering finishing blows with its sharp claws.

cards.name: Dark Assailant
cards.description: Armed with Psycho Sword, this sinister cutthroat rules the outer land.

cards.name: Candle of Fate
cards.description: An opponent's fate is decided when the flames of each finger are extinguished.

cards.name: Water Element
cards.description: A water spirit that envelops its opponent in a thick fog to cover its attack.

cards.name: Dissolverock
cards.description: A monster borne from the lava pits. Generates intensive heat that can melt away its enemies.

cards.name: Meda Bat
cards.description: An eyeball fiend created by a servant of darkness. Uses "Dark Spheres" to blow away its enemies.

cards.name: One Who Hunts Souls
cards.description: A creature with a sword that gains its power from the life forces of its victims.
